en-US 60 Bridgeway Benefit Technologies: Product Owner Anywhere in the World Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote </p> <div class=""><br><p><span><span>Bridgeway</span><span>&nbsp;is seeking a Product Owner to</span><span>&nbsp;oversee the&nbsp;</span><span>development of products from start to completion to ensure they meet our customer needs.&nbsp;</span><span>The Product Owner will&nbsp;</span><span>be responsible for</span><span>&nbsp;</span><span>determining</span><span>&nbsp;the overall vision of products,&nbsp;</span><span>guiding the&nbsp;</span><span>Technical</span><span> team on user story requirements, prioritizing feature work, and ultimately&nbsp;</span><span>drive</span><span>&nbsp;teams to build successful solutions.&nbsp;</span><span>Successful Product Owners&nbsp;</span><span>act as close&nbsp;</span><span>partner</span><span>&nbsp;with&nbsp;</span><span>architecture</span><span>, engineering, marketing, customer support, and sales to build a best-in-class experience for our c</span><span>ustomers</span><span>.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></span></p><br><p><span><span>This is a remote position with occasional travel. </span></span><span><span> </span></span><span><span> </span></span><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><strong><span><span>Responsibilities:</span></span></strong><span><span> </span></span><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><ul><br><li><span><span>Collaborates with cross-functional teams and various stakeholders to&nbsp;</span><span>optimize</span><span>&nbsp;current and new product offerings, including analytics, design/user experience, engineering, and user enablement.&nbsp;</span></span></li><br><li>Turns data insights into products with actionable outcomes to the customer. <span>&nbsp;</span></li><br><li>Works in an Agile environment and continuously reviews the business needs, refines priorities, outlines milestones and deliverables, and identifies opportunities and risks.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Prioritizes and informs stakeholders of the product vision, strategy, features, and prioritization to internal and external. <span>&nbsp;</span></li><br><li>Works with user-focused departments to define self-service user experience, support, and monitoring for customers. <span>&nbsp;</span></li><br><li>Partners with sales departments to align prioritization with customer needs <span>&nbsp;</span></li><br><li>Translates product roadmap features into well-defined product requirements including features, Epics, user stories, and acceptance test criteria. <span>&nbsp;</span></li><br><li>Prioritizes and maintains the sprint backlog for assigned products, balancing the requirements of stakeholders.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Leads the product functional design process based on an intimate knowledge of the users and technology. <span>&nbsp;</span></li><br><li>Defines and executes go-to-market plan, working to ensure that product management, marketing, and sales have what they need to be successful.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Develops and maintains appropriate tracking and reporting of product performance post-launch to evaluate future investment. Provide an active role in mitigating impediments impacting successful team completion of Release/Sprint Goals.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Research and analyze market, the users, and the roadmap for the product. Follow competitors and the industry.</li><br><li>Partners with Technical Writers to produce and maintain product documentation including release notes, user guides and customer communications.</li><br><li>Actively participate in Process alignment, improvement and roll out strategy with Product and Engineering teams and leadership.</li><br><li>Participate or lead product-related meetings like CCB, DRB, product showcases, UGC sessions, VOC’s, etc. within respective product space.<span>&nbsp;</span></li><br></ul><br><p><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><strong><span><span>Requirements:</span></span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><ul><br><li><span><span>3</span><span>+</span><span> taking&nbsp;</span><span>product</span><span>&nbsp;to market</span></span></li><br><li><span>Proven </span><span>track record</span><span>&nbsp;of delivering data driven solutions with a
